title: Manufacturing Engineer - Prince Pipes - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Prince Pipes - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Prince Pipes has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Prince Pipes:
Prince Pipes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prince Pipes!
